Title: High-resolution mass models of dwarf galaxies from LITTLE THINGS 
Authors: Oh S.-H., Hunter D.A., Brinks E., Elmegreen B.G., Schruba A., 
         Walter F., Rupen M.P., Young L.M., Simpson C.E., Johnson M., 
         Herrmann K.A., Ficut-Vicas D., Cigan P., Heesen V., Ashley T., 
         Zhang H. 
Figure: Rotation curves (DM only) of the first nine LITTE THINGS
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: dbf2C.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes Format Units   Label  Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  8 A8     ---     Name   Galaxy identifier
  10- 14 A5     ---     Type   Data type (1)
  16- 23 F8.6   kpc     R0.3   The R_0.3_ value
  25- 33 F9.6   km/s    V0.3   The V_0.3 value
  35- 42 F8.6   ---     R      Radius scaled by R0.3
  44- 51 F8.6   ---     V      Velocity scaled by V0.3
  53- 60 F8.6   ---   e_V      Uncertainty in V
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note (1): 
    Data = The scaled DM (baryon subtracted) rotation velocity which is 
           corrected for the asymmetric drift.
   Model = Pseudo-isothermal halo model fit to the DM rotation velocity.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
